title: Cable Bicycle Lock 650x6mm- Secure Steel Cable & Polypropylene Head | Covered for Extra Protection | 2 Key Bike Lock | for Scooters Gates & Outdoor Equipment | Anti-Theft Design
features: 🔒 SECURE ANTI-THEFT BIKE LOCK – Strong internal steel cable helps protect your bike, scooter or gate from theft. Ideal for everyday use in urban, outdoor or high-traffic areas.
🗝️ INCLUDES 2 KEYS FOR CONVENIENCE – Supplied with 2 durable keys for daily use or backup. Smooth locking mechanism ensures quick, reliable security with no codes to forget.
🚲 UNIVERSAL USE FOR OUTDOOR GEAR – Suitable for bicycles, scooters, gates, pushchairs, garden tools and more. A must-have for protecting your belongings on the move.
🧰 DURABLE & WEATHER-RESISTANT BUILD – Coated cable resists wear, moisture and rust. Strong polypropylene lock head offers dependable security with a compact design.
🎒 LIGHTWEIGHT & EASY TO CARRY – At 650mm x 6mm, it fits easily in backpacks or under seats. Perfect for commuters, students, or everyday riders needing quick lock access.
description: Keep your bike and gear safe wherever you go with this Cable Bicycle Lock 650x6mm – a compact, durable and reliable anti-theft solution designed for cyclists, scooter users, and anyone needing portable security. Made with a strong steel cable and finished with a protective outer coating, this lock helps prevent cutting, scratching and rust in daily use. The polypropylene lock head offers a secure and easy-to-use mechanism, while the included 2-key system ensures you always have a backup. No combinations to remember – just turn, lock, and go. Its compact length makes it ideal for securing frames and wheels to bike racks, fences, posts or gates. Perfect for commuting, university campuses, short stops or outdoor storage, this lock also works well for pushchairs, garden furniture, gates and sports equipment. Lightweight and portable, it easily fits in your bag, basket or mounted lock holder. Whether you're cycling to work or securing tools in the garden, this steel cable bike lock offers simple, strong protection wherever life takes you.
